page: Vultr vcg-a16-48c-496g-128vram is a Cloud GPU family server configured with an x86_64 architecture. It features 48 Intel physical cores running at 2.0 GHz with a shared CPU allocation. The system is equipped with 496.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 10.33 GB of RAM per core. For acceleration, it bundles eight NVIDIA Ampere A16 GPUs, delivering a combined 128 GB of VRAM. Local storage consists of a 1500 GB NVMe SSD, and the server includes one complimentary public IPv4 address.

In benchmark testing, the server demonstrates a stress-ng single-core CPU performance score of 1781.09, placing it in the average tier. However, its multi-core performance is strong, scoring 73907.77 in the stress-ng multi-core benchmark, which ranks in the top 25 percent. This highlights a performance profile that scales efficiently across its 48 physical cores despite the shared CPU allocation and lower single-core clock speed.

Given the high density of eight NVIDIA GPUs and 496.0 GB of RAM, this server offers a specialized hardware profile for parallel processing workloads. The combination of high-capacity system memory, NVMe storage, and multi-GPU acceleration makes it suitable for memory-intensive GPU workloads, virtual desktop infrastructure hosting, video transcoding, and parallelized data processing.
description: Vultr vcg-a16-48c-496g-128vram is a Cloud GPU server featuring 48 Intel physical cores on an x86_64 architecture, running at 2.0 GHz with shared CPU allocation. It is equipped with 496.0 GB of system memory and a 1500 GB NVMe SSD. The primary hardware highlight is the inclusion of eight NVIDIA Ampere A16 GPUs, providing a total of 128 GB of VRAM. In performance evaluations, the server achieves an average stress-ng single-core score of 1781.09, but delivers a strong multi-core score of 73907.77, placing it in the top 25 percent. This resource density makes the server highly suitable for parallelized GPU-accelerated tasks, virtual desktop infrastructure hosting, and video streaming or transcoding workloads requiring substantial memory and multi-GPU capabilities.
og_description: Vultr vcg-a16-48c-496g-128vram is a Cloud GPU server featuring 48 Intel cores, 496 GB RAM, a 1500 GB NVMe SSD, and eight NVIDIA Ampere A16 GPUs with 128 GB total VRAM for parallelized workloads.

tagline: An accelerated multi-GPU server featuring eight Ampere GPUs, high-capacity system memory, and fast local NVMe storage for parallel processing.
bullet_points: Eight NVIDIA Ampere A16 GPUs providing a total of 128 GB VRAM
48 Intel physical cores running at 2.0 GHz with shared allocation
496.0 GB of system memory and 1500 GB of local NVMe SSD storage
